calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Thruth Of Matters Specified In Pltf'S Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Wednesday, December 10, 2014 re: PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS V LLC'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And For An Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In Plaintiff Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, request for production of documents, for an order deeming admitted the genuineness of the documents and the truth of the matters specified in plaintiff's first set of requests for admissions and for sanctions is granted. Defendant is ordered to serve verified responses, without objection, to plaintiff's first set of form interrogatories and request for production of documents, within 20 days of service of notice of entry of this order. The genuineness of the documents and the truth of the matters specified in plaintiff's first set of requests for admission are deemed admitted. Defendant is ordered to pay plaintiff sanctions in the sum of $290 within 20 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Plaintiff's counsel to submit a form of order which tracks the Court's rulings.
Judge Pro Tem: Margaret M. Niver; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
